_comments.@leeoniya/ufuzzy: KEEP  ~12KB  — fuzzy paragraph search, used in core highlight flow
_comments.boarding.js: KEEP  ~50KB  — onboarding tour, used in sr-onboarding-handler + socratiq-onboarding. Only loads after first visit check.
_comments.chart.js: KEEP  ~200KB — use tree-shaken named imports only (NOT chart.js/auto). spaced-repetition-stats.js was importing /auto and has been fixed.
_comments.compromise: KEEP  ~1.5MB — NLP lib. 3 live usages: (1) backupQuiz.js createQuiz() = offline quiz fallback when LLM API fails (called in 4 places in index.js); (2) key_terms_summary.js getTopics() = called on every chat save for topic tagging (hot path); (3) chapterSummaries.js generateSectionSummary() = stop-word filter (replaceable with vanilla JS, but won't save dep while (1)+(2) exist). Cannot remove without killing offline quiz mode.
_comments.crypto-js: KEEP  ~80KB  — used in hashUtils.js for SHA-256 PDF verification. Could replace with native SubtleCrypto (Web Crypto API) to drop this dep entirely.
_comments.d3: REVIEW ~570KB — full d3 bundle, only used in KnowledgeGraph.js. Consider importing only needed subpackages (e.g. d3-force, d3-selection, d3-zoom) to cut ~400KB.
_comments.idb: KEEP  ~8KB   — IndexedDB wrapper, used throughout quiz/spaced-rep storage.
_comments.ink-mde: KEEP  ~150KB — Markdown editor in spaced-rep flashcard modal. Lazy-loaded on modal open.
_comments.jsonrepair: KEEP  ~30KB  — used for repairing malformed LLM JSON responses.
_comments.jspdf: KEEP  ~250KB — PDF export in generateQuizPDF.js. Only loaded on explicit PDF export action.
_comments.jspdf-autotable: KEEP  ~80KB  — jspdf table plugin, paired with jspdf above.
_comments.katex: KEEP  ~280KB — math rendering in streamdown_markdown.js. KaTeX is already the lean alternative to MathJax.
_comments.markdown-it-container: KEEP  ~5KB   — custom container blocks (spoiler, info, etc.).
_comments.mermaid: KEEP  ~800KB — diagram rendering. Already lazy-initialized. Largest single dep — acceptable for diagram support.
_comments.dompurify: KEEP  ~45KB  — XSS sanitization added for security fixes. Small cost, high value.
